title: User Authentication - Successful Login
description: Verify that users can login successfully with correct email and password, and role-based access is enforced.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Input valid registered email and correct password
Click the login button
User is authenticated, session is created, and dashboard relevant to user role is displayed

title: User Authentication - Failed Login with Incorrect Credentials
description: Verify login fails when user provides incorrect email or password, with proper error message.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Input invalid email or incorrect password
Click the login button
Display appropriate error message and prevent access

title: Multi-Tenant Data Isolation
description: Ensure that users from one company cannot see or access data belonging to another company under all UI views and API responses.

steps.description: Login as user from Company A
Attempt to access candidate profiles, job postings, and assessments of Company B via UI and API
Access is denied with appropriate errors and no data leakage occurs

title: Job Posting Creation and Visibility
description: Verify that authorized HR users can create, edit, and publish job postings with company branding and instant assessment toggling, and jobs appear correctly on public career page.

steps.description: Login as HR user
Navigate to job management page and create a new job posting with all required fields
Enable instant assessment toggle and save
Job appears in the company’s public career page with correct company branding and instant assessment enabled

title: Candidate Application Flow with CV Upload and Parsing
description: Verify that candidates can apply via public job application portal, upload CV, and that CV is parsed accurately by Mistral AI with structured data stored.

steps.description: Open public job application page for an active job
Fill candidate details and upload a valid CV file
Submit application
Application is accepted, CV parsing API is called, and parsed structured data is saved and viewable in candidate profile

title: AI Interview System - Chatbot Interview Flow Successful
description: Validate that AI chatbot using Google Gemini conducts STAR method interview in Bahasa Indonesia and returns conversational responses correctly.

steps.description: Start AI interview session for candidate
Respond to chatbot questions sequentially
AI responses are returned in Bahasa Indonesia aligned with STAR interview method and chat history is maintained

title: AI Interview System - Fallback On API Error
description: Verify that the system handles Google Gemini API failures gracefully, showing meaningful error messages or retry options.

steps.description: Simulate Google Gemini API timeout or failure when generating response
UI shows error notification and allows retry without data loss

title: Fraud Risk Analysis Accuracy and Mapping
description: Ensure that the fraud risk analysis API correctly processes interview transcripts and structured answers to produce valid scores, risk levels, red flags, and hiring recommendations.

steps.description: Submit a valid candidate interview transcript and structured fraud triangle answers to fraud risk analysis API
Response returns numeric scores within expected ranges, correct mapping to risk levels, relevant red flags, and readable recommendations

title: Background Check Initiation and Credit Deduction
description: Verify that initiating a KYC background check via Didit integration deducts the appropriate number of credits from the company’s balance and generates a secure verification link.

steps.description: Trigger background check for a candidate through UI
Check Didit API is called correctly, a verification link is generated, company credits decrease accordingly, and logs are updated

title: KYC Status Update via Webhook
description: Verify that real-time KYC status updates from Didit webhook are processed securely and update candidate profile statuses appropriately.

steps.description: Send mock webhook payloads mimicking Didit status updates (e.g. success, pending, failed)
System processes updates securely verifying payload authenticity, updates candidate KYC status in database and UI, and logs event

title: Credit System Transactions and Logging
description: Validate that all credit usage and subscription transactions are logged with proper metadata, and company credit balances update accurately.

steps.description: Perform operations that consume credits (background checks, assessment invites)
Purchase or upgrade subscription tiers
Verify credit balances, transaction logs contain correct timestamps, user info, action details, and no discrepancies exist

title: Email Invitation System with Template Variables
description: Verify candidate and interview email invitations are sent successfully using Resend API with all template variables populated correctly.

steps.description: Send email invitation for candidate and interview through the system
Emails are delivered, templates render variables such as candidate name, job title, interview link correctly, and success response is received

title: Public Routes and Access Code Validation
description: Ensure all public routes are accessible without authentication but enforce assessment access code validation before allowing assessment start.

steps.description: Visit public job application and assessment pages without login
Attempt to start assessment with and without valid access code
Assessments start only with valid access code; invalid or missing codes block access with appropriate message

title: Dashboard Real-Time Data and Role-Based Views
description: Verify that the executive dashboard provides up-to-date timeline events, company stats, and recent activities filtered and displayed as per user role.

steps.description: Login as user with different roles (HR, Admin, Superadmin)
Dashboard data updates in near-real-time and displayed information is appropriate to user role permissions

title: Workflow Management - Custom Steps and Credit Costs
description: Verify that recruitment workflows can be configured with customized steps and assigned credit costs, and changes persist correctly.

steps.description: Access workflow manager, add/edit workflow steps and assign credit cost values
Save and retrieve workflows
Workflow steps and credit costs are saved properly and reflected in candidate assessment and credit deductions

title: Edge Case - Insufficient Credits Handling
description: Verify system behavior when a company has insufficient credits to start background checks or send assessment invitations, ensuring proper error messages and no operation completion.

steps.description: Setup company with zero or insufficient credits
Attempt to initiate background check or send assessment invitation
Operations are blocked, user receives clear error message about insufficient credits, and no credits are deducted

title: Edge Case - Concurrency in Candidate Application
description: Simulate multiple simultaneous candidate applications to verify system handles data concurrency properly without data loss or race conditions.

steps.description: Simultaneously submit multiple candidate applications for the same job
All applications are processed correctly, stored distinctly, and no data overwrites or corruption occurs

title: Edge Case - API Timeout Handling
description: Verify that timeouts or delays in AI services (Google Gemini, Mistral AI) or Didit background check do not crash the system and provide user feedback.

steps.description: Simulate delayed or timed out responses from AI or Didit APIs
System handles timeouts gracefully by retrying or showing informative messages without freezing or crashing

title: Company Branding Application
description: Verify that each company’s branding settings (logo, colors) are correctly applied across their public pages and admin UI components.

steps.description: Update company logo and color settings in company profile
Changes are reflected immediately and consistently on public career page, job postings, assessments, and admin interfaces

title: History and Audit View Filtering and Search
description: Verify that users can filter and search historical interview sessions and audit trails by multiple criteria and that results update correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to history and audit views
Apply filters such as date range, user, and event type; perform keyword search
Filtered and searched results reflect criteria accurately with no missing or extra records
